regions.content:
1. 本图适用配同步带轮。 The figure applies with timing pulley.
  2. 减速机速比: 36.75:1。 Reducer speed ratio: 36.75:1.
  3. 润滑油脂: VIGO GREASE REO或RE-00 (MOLYWHITE)。 Grease: VIGO GREASE REO or RE-00 (MOLYWHITE).
  4. 额定输出扭矩: 980N.m (输出转速: 15R/Min)。 Rated output torque: 980N.m (output speed: 15R / Min).
  5. 系统减速比: 36.75乘以同步带级的速比。 System reduction ratio: 36.75 multiplied by the speed ratio belt.
regions.content_en:
1. This drawing applies to timing pulley assembly.
  2. Reducer speed ratio: 36.75:1.
  3. : VIGO GREASE REORE-00(MOLYWHITE)。 Grease: VIGO GREASE REO or RE-00(MOLYWHITE).
  4. Rated output torque: 980 N·m(output speed: 15 r/min).
  5. System reduction ratio: 36.75 multiplied by the speed ratio of the timing belt stage.
